changes.what_changed: Version check now uses an explicit curl command to extract the remote tag instead of vague natural language instruction.
changes.old_behavior: Instruction said 'fetch... extract tag_name' without specifying how. Claude guessed a parsing method that silently failed, causing the version check to always resolve to empty and report a false network error.
changes.new_behavior: Arch runs curl piped to jq as the primary extraction method, with a grep/cut fallback for systems without jq. Both commands verified against the live API.
changes.user_impact: Existing installs must update the version check line in ARCHITECT.md manually — the fix is one line. New installs get it automatically.
changes.user_impact_plain: The version check was silently broken for everyone. This fixes it. If you installed before today, you need to update one line in your ARCHITECT.md.
migration_steps: Open ARCHITECT.md in your project root.
Find the Version check step in Session Start. It will contain the phrase 'Fetch latest release tag from'.

Replace that phrase and everything after it up to 'If tag_name matches' with: Run `curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/russelleNVy/three-man-team/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name' 2>/dev/null` to get the remote tag. If jq is unavailable, fall back to `curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/russelleNVy/three-man-team/releases/latest | grep -o '"tag_name": *"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4`.
Save the file. The version check will work correctly on the next session start.

changes.what_changed: Fixed typo in Bob spinup prompt — 'BOB.md' corrected to 'BUILDER.md'.
changes.old_behavior: Arch's spinup prompt told Bob to read BOB.md, which does not exist. Bob would fail to load his role file.
changes.user_impact: Existing installs must update the Bob spinup line in ARCHITECT.md. Find 'Then read BOB.md' and change it to 'Then read BUILDER.md'.
changes.user_impact_plain: There was a typo in the instructions Arch gives Bob when spinning him up. Bob was told to read a file that doesn't exist. Easy one-word fix in your ARCHITECT.md.
migration_steps: Open ARCHITECT.md in your project root.
Find the Briefing Bob section. Look for the line: 'Then read BOB.md, then handoff/ARCHITECT-BRIEF.md.'

arch_opening: I see version {version} of Three Man Team is available. Two bug fixes — one of them has been silently breaking the version check since v1.2.3, and the other is a typo in how I spin up Bob. Both are quick to fix. Want me to walk you through it?
